/bin/zsh -c "rg -n \"def get_unpacked_marks|def test_mark_mro|pytestmark\" src/_pytest/mark testing/test_mark.py | head -80 && sed -n '360,420p' src/_pytest/mark/structures.py && sed -n '1110,1140p' testing/test_mark.py && git status --short"

/bin/zsh -c "sed -n '330,375p' src/_pytest/mark/structures.py; rg -n \"get_unpacked_marks\\(\" src testing | head -100; sed -n '1,80p' src/_pytest/mark/structures.py; rg -n \"normalize_mark_list\\(\" src testing"

/bin/zsh -c "sed -n '330,375p' src/_pytest/mark/structures.py; rg -n \"get_unpacked_marks\\(\" src testing | head -100; sed -n '1,80p' src/_pytest/mark/structures.py; rg -n \"normalize_mark_list\\(\" src testing"

changes.diff:
@@ -357,8 +357,14 @@
 
-def get_unpacked_marks(obj: object) -> Iterable[Mark]:
+def get_unpacked_marks(obj: object, *, consider_mro: bool = True) -> List[Mark]:
     """Obtain the unpacked marks that are stored on an object."""
-    mark_list = getattr(obj, "pytestmark", [])
-    if not isinstance(mark_list, list):
-        mark_list = [mark_list]
-    return normalize_mark_list(mark_list)
+    if inspect.isclass(obj) and consider_mro:
+        mark_lists = [x.__dict__.get("pytestmark", []) for x in obj.__mro__]
+        mark_list = []
+        for marks in mark_lists:
+            mark_list.extend(marks if isinstance(marks, list) else [marks])
+    else:
+        mark_list = getattr(obj, "pytestmark", [])
+        if not isinstance(mark_list, list):
+            mark_list = [mark_list]
+    return list(normalize_mark_list(mark_list))
 
@@ -390,3 +396,3 @@
     # was only borrowed.
-    obj.pytestmark = [*get_unpacked_marks(obj), mark]
+    obj.pytestmark = [*get_unpacked_marks(obj, consider_mro=False), mark]

changes.diff:
@@ -359,4 +359,5 @@
     """Obtain the unpacked marks that are stored on an object."""
-    if inspect.isclass(obj) and consider_mro:
-        mark_lists = [x.__dict__.get("pytestmark", []) for x in obj.__mro__]
+    if inspect.isclass(obj):
+        classes = obj.__mro__ if consider_mro else (obj,)
+        mark_lists = [x.__dict__.get("pytestmark", []) for x in classes]
         mark_list = []
